name: google_play_reviews_scraper
title: Google Play Reviews Scraper
description: Fetch a public Google Play app page and return the visible review cards with reviewer names, ratings, dates, body text, helpful counts, review IDs, and avatar URLs.

seo.title: Google Play Reviews Scraper Tool for App Feedback
seo.description: Extract visible Google Play review cards with Better Fetch, including reviewer names, ratings, dates, body text, helpful counts, review IDs, and source URLs.
seo.intro: Google Play Reviews Scraper gives agents a validated first slice of Android app feedback. Provide a package name or Google Play URL and the tool fetches the public app detail page, extracts the visible review cards, and normalizes reviewer names, ratings, dates, body text, helpful counts, review IDs, avatars, and the source app URL.

useCases.title: App feedback snapshots
useCases.description: Pull the visible Google Play review cards for a product or competitor before sending an analyst or agent into deeper sentiment work.

useCases.title: Release monitoring
useCases.description: Capture current public review snippets, star ratings, dates, and helpful counts after a major Android app release.

useCases.title: Support triage
useCases.description: Give customer support or product agents structured examples of recent visible complaints and praise without hand-copying store text.

faqs.question: Does Google Play Reviews Scraper paginate every review?
faqs.answer: No. Version 0.1 extracts the review cards visible in the public app page HTML. Full pagination and advanced filtering should be built as later validated slices.

faqs.question: Can I pass a Google Play URL instead of an app ID?
faqs.answer: Yes. The tool accepts a package ID such as com.openai.chatgpt or a Google Play details URL containing an id parameter.

faqs.question: Does this require a Google account or API key?
faqs.answer: No. The tool reads public Google Play app pages through Better Fetch and does not use account-specific Google credentials.

app_id_or_url.description: Google Play app package ID or details URL containing an id parameter.

language.description: Google Play hl parameter, such as en-US or de-DE.

country.description: Google Play gl parameter, such as US, AU, GB, or DE.

max_reviews.description: Maximum visible review cards to return.
